entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `instructions` TEXT NOT NULL, `tips` TEXT NOT NULL, `difficulty` TEXT NOT NULL, `isUnilateral` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isCompound` INTEGER NOT NULL, `defaultSets` INTEGER NOT NULL, `defaultReps` TEXT NOT NULL, `defaultRestSeconds` INTEGER NOT NULL, `estimatedDurationSeconds` INTEGER NOT NULL, `trainingPhasePresets` TEXT NOT NULL, `localMediaUris` TEXT NOT NULL, `externalMediaUrls` TEXT NOT NULL, `timesPerformed` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastPerformedAt` INTEGER, `isFavorite` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isArchived` INTEGER NOT NULL, `personalNotes` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `iconName` TEXT NOT NULL, `isCustom` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isPortable` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `iconName` TEXT NOT NULL, `isDefault` INTEGER NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `notes` TEXT NOT NULL, `locationId` INTEGER, `targetDurationMinutes` INTEGER NOT NULL, `targetCategories` TEXT NOT NULL, `status` TEXT NOT NULL, `plannedDate` INTEGER NOT NULL, `scheduledTimeSlot` TEXT NOT NULL, `startedAt` INTEGER, `completedAt` INTEGER, `actualDurationMinutes` INTEGER, `perceivedDifficulty` INTEGER, `energyLevel` INTEGER, `satisfactionRating` INTEGER, `postSessionNotes` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `sessionId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `exerciseId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `orderIndex` INTEGER NOT NULL, `section` TEXT NOT NULL, `plannedSets` INTEGER NOT NULL, `plannedReps` TEXT NOT NULL, `plannedRestSeconds` INTEGER NOT NULL, `prescriptionJson` TEXT NOT NULL, `isCompleted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isSkipped` INTEGER NOT NULL, `notes` TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`sessionId`) REFERENCES `workout_sessions`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`exerciseId`) REFERENCES `exercises`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `sessionExerciseId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `setNumber` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reps` INTEGER, `weight` REAL, `weightUnit` TEXT NOT NULL, `durationSeconds` INTEGER, `distance` REAL, `distanceUnit` TEXT NOT NULL, `rpe` INTEGER, `restTakenSeconds` INTEGER, `notes` TEXT NOT NULL, `completedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`sessionExerciseId`) REFERENCES `session_exercises`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `templateId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `exerciseId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `orderIndex` INTEGER NOT NULL, `section` TEXT NOT NULL, `plannedSets` INTEGER NOT NULL, `plannedReps` TEXT NOT NULL, `plannedRestSeconds` INTEGER NOT NULL, `prescriptionJson` TEXT NOT NULL, `coachingNotes` TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`templateId`) REFERENCES `workout_plan_templates`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`exerciseId`) REFERENCES `exercises`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `therapistName` TEXT NOT NULL, `condition` TEXT NOT NULL, `frequency` TEXT NOT NULL, `timesPerDay` INTEGER NOT NULL, `preferredTimeSlots` TEXT NOT NULL, `startDate` INTEGER NOT NULL, `endDate` INTEGER, `isMustDo` INTEGER NOT NULL, `priority` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isActive` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isArchived` INTEGER NOT NULL, `notes` TEXT NOT NULL, `precautions` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `routineId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `startedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `completedAt` INTEGER, `timeSlot` TEXT NOT NULL, `exercisesCompleted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `exercisesTotal` INTEGER NOT NULL, `painLevelBefore` INTEGER, `painLevelAfter` INTEGER, `notes` TEXT NOT NULL, `symptomChanges` TEXT NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `currentPhase` TEXT NOT NULL, `phaseStartDate` INTEGER NOT NULL, `phaseEndDate` INTEGER, `categoryWeights` TEXT NOT NULL, `minDaysBetweenSameCategory` INTEGER NOT NULL, `maxDaysWithoutCategory` INTEGER NOT NULL, `ensureWeeklyVariety` INTEGER NOT NULL, `preferredSessionDurationMinutes` INTEGER NOT NULL, `maxSessionsPerDay` INTEGER NOT NULL, `preferredRestDays` TEXT NOT NULL, `autoProgressionEnabled` INTEGER NOT NULL, `progressionThreshold` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`category` TEXT NOT NULL, `totalSessions` INTEGER NOT NULL, `totalExercises` INTEGER NOT NULL, `totalMinutes` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastTrainedAt` INTEGER, `daysSinceLastTrained` INTEGER NOT NULL, `avgSessionsPerWeek` REAL NOT NULL, `avgMinutesPerSession` REAL NOT NULL, `currentStreak` INTEGER NOT NULL, `longestStreak` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`category`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `iconName` TEXT NOT NULL, `defaultWeight` REAL NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `exerciseId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `suggestedCategory` TEXT NOT NULL, `suggestedInSessionId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `action` TEXT NOT NULL, `dayOfWeek` INTEGER NOT NULL, `hourOfDay` INTEGER NOT NULL, `timeSlot` TEXT NOT NULL, `daysSinceExercisePerformed` INTEGER NOT NULL, `daysSinceCategoryTrained` INTEGER NOT NULL, `exerciseTimesPerformed` INTEGER NOT NULL, `difficultyLevel` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sessionDurationMinutes` INTEGER NOT NULL, `currentBalanceScore` INTEGER NOT NULL, `perceivedDifficulty` INTEGER, `satisfactionRating` INTEGER, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`key` TEXT NOT NULL, `score` REAL NOT NULL, `confidence` REAL NOT NULL, `sampleCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`key`))
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`exerciseId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`exerciseId`, `category`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`exerciseId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `equipmentId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isRequired` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isAlternative` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`exerciseId`, `equipmentId`))
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`exerciseId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `muscleGroup` TEXT NOT NULL, `isPrimary` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`exerciseId`, `muscleGroup`))
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`exerciseId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `customCategoryId` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`exerciseId`, `customCategoryId`))
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`locationId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `equipmentId` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`locationId`, `equipmentId`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`routineId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `exerciseId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `orderIndex` INTEGER NOT NULL, `prescribedSets` INTEGER NOT NULL, `prescribedReps` TEXT NOT NULL, `prescribedHoldSeconds` INTEGER, `prescribedRestSeconds` INTEGER NOT NULL, `specialInstructions` TEXT NOT NULL, `progressionNotes` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`routineId`, `exerciseId`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`variationExerciseId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `parentExerciseId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `focus` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`variationExerciseId`), FOREIGN KEY(`variationExerciseId`) REFERENCES `exercises`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`parentExerciseId`) REFERENCES `exercises`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )
